details: Table 2 row 3-NO2 with '233 expl.' is a contiguous substring; iodylarene (R = 3-NO2) decomposition at 233 °C confirmed.
Compound 2c '3-(2-furanyl)-6-(1-naphthylmethyl)-1,2,4-triazolo[3,4-b]-1,3,4-thiadiazole ( 2c ): Yield 64 %; Mp. 146-148°C' matches verbatim.
DOI 10.1021/jm3014162 maps to corpora/full_168 but no specific subfolder exists; the J Med Chem paper was not downloaded and could not be located via search for compound name or DOI.
Compound 6b '2-(8-Hydroxy-7-((4-methylpiperazin-1-yl)methyl)quinolin-5-yl)isoindoline-1,3-dione ( 6b ) Brown powder (36 mg, 88% yield); m.p. 255–259 °C;' matches verbatim.
Compound 12i with 'MP = 253–255 °C' is a contiguous substring; coumarin-triazole hybrid name confirmed.
Compound 13b 'Piperidine-1-carboxylic acid (5-benzyl-4-phenyl-4H-[1,2,4]triazol-3-thiomethyl)-amide ( 13b ). From piperdine (0.09 g). Colorless crystals (0.35 g, 83%); mp 109 °C' matches verbatim.
Table 1 row 'cyclooctatetraene 268.5 cubane 405' is contiguous in Brown 2000; 405 K - 273.15 = 131.85 °C correct.
FURL-G5 line '(Z)-N-furoyl-N-benzyl-N-(4-fluorophenyl)guanidine (FURL-G5). White solid; yield 76.55%; mp: 105.8–106.6 °C' matches verbatim.
DOI 10.1021/acs.joc.9b00711 maps to corpora/full_168 root only; the JOC paper was not downloaded and could not be located by Shipilovskikh or tetrahydrobenzo[b]thiophen search.

compound_name is '(Yield 94%),' — a procedure-text fragment, not a real compound name. The actual compound is 2-(4-methoxyphenyl)benzo[d]thiazole (paper title); evidence quote contains the fragment as contiguous text but the compound_name field is invalid.
Compound 18 '4-Acetylthiosemicarbazone-4'-acetylsemicarbazone diphenyl sulphone ( 18 )' with 'm.p >350°C (decomp.)' matches paper.
